generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLidarPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance DepthCameraVisual : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual and depth data from Intel D435i Depth Camera"
]

instance VehicleSpeedMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO15622AccControlLogicModel
]

instance SteeringAngleMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO15622AccControlLogicModel
]

instance ObjectDetectionsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object detections from DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService, SQLDataStorageEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected path from ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance VehicleStateMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data of vehicle state metrics (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDataStorageEnabler
]

instance HokuyoLidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarPointCloud
]

instance DepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraVisual
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedMeasurement
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleMeasurement
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTracksVirtualSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData
]

instance ProjectedPathDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ProjectedPathVirtualSensor
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedPathData
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-node communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppForRos2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for ROS2 node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL for data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering algorithm for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ISO15622AccControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic for performance class I"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppForRos2
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected path"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data saving for vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Report generation from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AccSystemExecution : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on cloud-hosted DT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableAcc : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableAcc : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, ProjectedPathVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on cloud-hosted DT to reduce on-board ECU load"
    DTDFVocab:provides AccSystemExecution
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableAcc, DisableAcc, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for visual and depth data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraVisualData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor for real-time speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for real-time steering angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance ObjectTracksVirtualSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for object tracks from DBSCAN and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
]

instance ProjectedPathVirtualSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for projected path from ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ProjectedPathDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator for speed control"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator for steering control"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control in 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis for mounting technology in 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for autonomy processing"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for autonomy processing"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speed and steering commands to motor and steering servo commands"
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collection Functional Entity for physical sensor data acquisition"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Functional Entity for DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity representing the real vehicle"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hosting virtual model"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for human interaction"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for external system integration"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, JetsonNX, JetsonOrinNano, VedderESC, HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, ActuationFE, DataCollectionFE, DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the ACC Controlling FE (e.g., desired speed calculations) and user commands (e.g., emergency braking, ACC enable/disable, speed adjustments) transmitted to the Physical Twin Entity's Actuation FE for motor voltage and steering servo control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency of ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185 V2V communication requirements) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all distributed components to ensure event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based orchestration with Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing/ACC logic), User Entity (visualization/control interfaces), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE); components communicate via ROS2 network (intra-entity) and Wi-Fi (inter-entity) with data serialization and unit conversion handled by the Data Translation FE."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for ADAS development and requirement validation) and operation phase (real-time optimization, health monitoring, and remote management of the ACC system during vehicle operation)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data Transmission via ROS2 network for intra-entity communication and Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions; latency constrained to ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin deployed on vehicle-mounted hardware (NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano); Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., ACC logic, data storage) hosted on cloud infrastructure for computation offloading; User Entity accessible via remote client interfaces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy (performance class I), and 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication latency requirements."
]
